category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes OSGeo/shapelib as the official repository of shapelib.
source_facts.description says Shapelib is a library for reading and writing ArcView Shapefiles.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title uses OSGeo/shapelib.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository contains README as project documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the official Shapelib MapTools page.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository is titled OSGeo/shapelib and describes itself as the official repository of shapelib.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says it reads and writes ArcView Shapefiles.
source_facts.executables lists shapefile and DBF command-line tools such as shpcreate, shpdump, dbfcreate, and dbfdump.
